title: Sam And _____
description: Sam and Gaz are a sketch duo who perform their act across the globe. They're sharp, they're well rehearsed, and impressively slick. The only problem is... Gaz isn't here. Can Sam handle a one man version of a two man act? Sam is a third of award winning comedy group Bad Clowns - praise for the Bad Clowns below: "A slick, briskly paced and wonderfully anarchic production" ★★★★★ - LondonTheatre1 "Brilliantly put together, witty and entertaining" ★★★★★ - West End Best Friend "More of this thing please!" ★★★★★ - Threeweeks "Surprising and genius" ★★★★★ - Get the Chance "I haven't laughed this hard in a long time" ★★★★★ - Number9 "Fast paced hour of idiotic nonsense" ★★★★ - Daily Express
